failed_attempts:
let l : List ℕ := [3, 2, 5, 7, 0, 7, 7, 2, 9, 11, 8, 7, 3, 10, 1, 11, 0, 11, 11, 10, 9, 7, 4, 11]
  let val (n : ℕ) := l.get! ((n - 1) % 24)
  have h_bound : ∀ x ∈ l, x < 12 := by decide
  have h_rec : ∀ i : Fin 24, l.get! ((i + 2) % 24) = (l.get! i + l.get! ((i + 1) % 24)) % 12 := by decide
  have h_valid : ∀ i : Fin 24, l.get! i ≠ 6 ∧ (l.get! i + l.get! ((i + 1) % 24)) % 12 ≠ 6 := by decide

  have h_cos : ∀ n, Real.cos (val n * Real.pi / 12) ≠ 0 := by
    intro n
    rw [Real.cos_eq_zero_iff]
    rintro ⟨k, hk⟩
    have h_val : (val n : ℝ) = 6 + 12 * k := by field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero] at hk; linarith
    have h_mem : val n ∈ l := List.get!_mem l _
    have h_lt : val n < 12 := h_bound (val n) h_mem
    norm_cast at h_val
    have : k = 0 := by zify at h_lt h_val; linarith
    subst k
    have : val n = 6 := by simpa using h_val
    have i : Fin 24 := ⟨(n - 1) % 24, Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)⟩
    exact (h_valid i).1 this

  have h_a : ∀ n, 1 ≤ n → a n = Real.tan (val n * Real.pi / 12) := by
    intro n hn
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ih
    rcases lt_or_eq_of_le hn with hn_gt1 | rfl
    rcases lt_or_eq_of_le (Nat.succ_le_of_lt hn_gt1) with hn_gt2 | rfl
    · let k := n - 2
      have hk : 1 ≤ k := by omega
      have h1 : k < n := by omega
      have h2 : k + 1 < n := by omega
      rw [←Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_of_lt hn_gt2), h₂ k hk, ih k h1 hk, ih (k+1) h2 (by omega)]
      let i : Fin 24 := ⟨(k - 1) % 24, Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)⟩
      have h_sum_ne : Real.cos ((val k + val (k + 1)) * Real.pi / 12) ≠ 0 := by
        rw [Real.cos_eq_zero_iff]; rintro ⟨m, hm⟩
        have : (val k + val (k+1) : ℝ) = 6 + 12 * m := by field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero] at hm; linarith
        norm_cast at this
        have : (val k + val (k+1)) % 12 = 6 := by rw [this, Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left]; rfl
        have h_idx : (k + 1 - 1) % 24 = (i + 1) % 24 := by
             simp [i]; rw [Nat.add_sub_assoc (by norm_num), Nat.add_mod]; rfl
        dsimp [val] at this
        rw [h_idx] at this
        exact (h_valid i).2 this
      rw [← Real.tan_add (h_cos k) (h_cos (k+1)) h_sum_ne]
      rw [Real.tan_eq_tan_iff_exists_int]
      use (val k + val (k + 1)) / 12
      have h_idx1 : (k + 1 - 1) % 24 = (i + 1) % 24 := by
             simp [i]; rw [Nat.add_sub_assoc (by norm_num), Nat.add_mod]; rfl
      have h_idx2 : (k + 2 - 1) % 24 = (i + 2) % 24 := by
             simp [i]; rw [Nat.add_sub_assoc (by norm_num), Nat.add_mod]; rfl
      have h_rec_app := h_rec i
      dsimp [val] at *
      rw [h_idx1, h_idx2]
      rw [h_rec_app]
      have : (l.get! i + l.get! ((i + 1) % 24)) = 12 * ((l.get! i + l.get! ((i + 1) % 24)) / 12) + (l.get! i + l.get! ((i + 1) % 24)) % 12 := (Nat.div_add_mod _ 12).symm
      rw [this]
      push_cast
      ring
    · rw [h₁]; dsimp [val]; norm_num; rw [Real.tan_pi_div_6]; field_simp; ring_nf; rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)]; ring
    · rw [h₀]; dsimp [val]; norm_num; rw [Real.tan_pi_div_4]

  rw [h_a 2009 (by norm_num)]
  have : val 2009 = 0 := by rfl
  rw [this, Real.tan_zero, abs_zero]
